goal: Make release value understandable as user-facing capability before release-ready claims.
risk: AOF may keep adding mechanisms while users cannot tell what changed.
loss_boundary: Do not call v9.3 release-ready unless capability register, matrix, delta, value evidence, and capability-first audit are present and green.
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, docs, runtime artifacts, focused tests, release-state audit
stop_conditions: Stop if release notes lead with mechanism rather than capability
Stop if no capability changes are recorded
